summary_en: 第四北越ＦＧ disclosed a cross-shareholding unwind policy. Frees balance-sheet capital and improves capital efficiency.
summary_jp: 第四北越ＦＧが政策保有株式の縮減方針を開示。資本効率の改善要因。

summary_en: 第四北越ＦＧ announced a material dividend change (dividend hike). Reframes the return-of-capital baseline.
summary_jp: 第四北越ＦＧが配当方針変更を開示（増配）。資本還元基準が刷新。
